feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,306Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 327

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,546Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Pairings are only ordered by their appearance in the story
  • And will be updated as we go

  • I am finally BACK baby!!!
  • In NZ
  • living my best life
  • Do I have a solid internet connection?
  • no!
  • Do I have a job?
  • Nope!
  • Have I finally relaxed maybe a single inch?
  • MAYBE!
  • Am I still obsessed with this ridiculous show and how much they all love each other in new and tragic ways?
  • Hell yes!
  • Fix-It
  • Series 2 onwards rewrite
  • Pls read the other parts first or this will make no sense
  • What if BBC's Merlin had emotional catharsis?
  • And consistency?
  • And a head writer who cared more about all these characters having long conversations with each other
  • Than actually advancing the plot
  • Ofc everyone is still in love with Merlin
  • And also Gwen
  • Guys I hate to jinx it but I think this is finally the part where the title should make sense
  • don't quote me though
  • No beta we die like Uther should have done seasons before he did
  • did ya miss me

entry.title: Walk of Shame
entry.summary:
Author: VeloxVoid

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,534Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 109

Summary: Arthur walks back through the streets of Camelot at daybreak, ruffled and dishevelled. To the citizens who sneak glances and whisper, the reason for his walk is a mystery. But to Arthur, mind still reeling after his first night with Merlin, it's his walk of shame. - Arthur and Merlin both fall deeper into a romance that they know can never be. One night's walk of shame turns into many.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Uther's Trick
entry.summary:
Author: Meowmix21

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,261Chapters: 52/?Kudos: 1,348

Summary: A life for a life was the deal for Arthur's birth, what does Uther do when he finds out that the deal was a bit more specific than he thought? Why find the loophole of course! If someone born from magic can't have a child normally... well you just have to find magic that can... or in this case, magic himself! From mood swings, to weddings, to assassins, to love potions and so much more, Merlin's pregnancy isn't going to be smooth sailing for anyone, especially not for Merlin.

entry.title: Two sides of the same coin
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,996Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Arthur was born of magic. Merlin was born magic. Merlin was born because of Arthur. Merlin was born FOR Arthur. Everything he'd ever done and will do, was and will be for Arthur. Always.   What happens when Arthur starts to appreciate Merlin and his efforts? What happens, when their emotions run wild and they won't be able to hold them back anymore? What happens when Merlin and Arthur finally give in to their desires and accept their true destiny: to be two sides of the same coin?

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,700Chapters: 167/?Kudos: 143

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: As beautiful as in our dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Linowish

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,611Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 14

Summary: After season 1, we said "I wish it was like this" and I wanted to try it too.   Merlin was getting really tired and continuing with his life without receiving any thanks; it was very difficult.Arthur was like everyone around him; everyone saw him only as a prince, no one saw him as a friend, except Merlin.

entry.title: You Should Thank Me My King (Preferably On Your Knees)
entry.summary:
Author: LangdonEmrys

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,062Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Arthur is King and the Albion Merlin has been promised has not occurred, While Arthur does not persecute magic, it is still not free. He is still not free. Merlin is growing tired of hiding who he is, of having to protect his king in secret. When he tries to tell Arthur about his magic and of what he has done. Arthur quick to anger tries to kill Merlin. Merlin heartbroken, snaps. He loves his king. He has sacrificed so much for his King. His King should be grateful. Should show him some respect. In an act of anger Merlin shows Arthur who he really is. The power he hold. He shows him that he should not be quick to anger. That he should thank him, preferably on his knees. Or Merlin snaps, and shows his king where he really belong. On his knees showing his Warlock some appreciation. Smut

entry.title: The Bargain of Avalon
entry.summary:
Author: DarkWhimsy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,050Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: When Arthur Pendragon wakes from a poisoning he shouldn't have survived, something is wrong. Not with his body, but with the shape of the world around him. Someone that no one remembers has gone missing, but Morgana tells him what she has Seen: that the tug he feels in his heart says this missing person is not dead. Somehow, this person paid a price to save Arthur, but it wasn't a life for a life, as the Balance requires. Arthur is going to do everything in his power to find this person, even if the council believes he's going mad like his father.

entry.title: The Absolution of the Son
entry.summary:
Author: LadyWhistleClown

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,402Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Arthur is angry when he learns that he is born of magic and that his Father sacrificed his Mother so he could have an heir. In this version of events, Merlin doesn't tell Arthur that Morgause lied to him. Arthur must confront his Father and face Camelot's history of discriminatory anti-magic policies head on, including his own role in them. All while he feels himself slowly drawn closer and closer to his manservant Merlin. Meanwhile, Merlin must continue to keep his magic secret and work in the shadows for the better future with Arthur he's been promised is his destiny.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,982Chapters: 19/24Kudos: 178

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: darling, the darkness is not the end
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,452Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: The first spell struck from behind. A sharp crack of binding magic snapped around his wrists before he could fully turn. Gold flared in his eyes on instinct, magic rising like breath in his lungs, but the second spell slammed into his chest a heartbeat later. Merlin staggered back a step. Cold iron chains wrapped around his arms and dragged tight with unnatural force. “Ah,” Merlin breathed. He straightened slowly, testing the pull of the restraints. “Right,” he added under his breath. “One of those days.”

entry.title: karen rescues a king in central park
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,538Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 46

Summary: Claire answered the phone grumpily, as she always did. Most of the time, the grumpiness was warranted. “Whaddya want?” she asked. “There’s this guy, sounds German or something but google translate isn’t picking up the language. Pretty sure he said the word Arthur though. And... Myrddin. And Camelot. Context clues, I think he’s claiming to be King Arthur.” “Karen, I swear, if you are prank calling me.” “I’m not. He’s this hunky blond dude, not as hunky as your Luke though, got a sword and everything. Wearing armor. I found him passed out by the Central Park reservoir. He’s kinda injured. No ID or anything.” “I’m coming over. You owe me. Again. Where are you?” “I brought him to the office. Seemed the best thing to do, in the circumstances.”   Merlin and Arthur in the MCU, just trying to live their lives. Featuring: Arthur's *dramatic* return and subsequent rescue from Central Park by Karen Page and a long-suffering Claire Temple, Brett Mahoney investigating that guy working in the morgue who's almost more of a cryptid than Daredevil, Merlin continuing to be lightly stalked by druids, and presumably, at some point, some actual vigilantes.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Forever Is My Tomorrow
entry.summary:
Author: Mahogany_Rust

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 436,472Chapters: 45/80Kudos: 1,463

Summary: It had actually been a long time since Hiccup had thought about how he would die.When he was young, every sunrise was another gamble to see if he would get himself eaten by a dragon or somehow manage to fall off one of Berk’s many cliffs.Perhaps Winter would finally choose to break his wiry body with illness or he would catch an unfortunate stray battle axe.Yet here he was, 21, about to die in the wrong place (not a bad age to reach in the Archipelago when you’re Hiccup Haddock, let's be honest). But that was the thing wasn’t it? Hiccup made plenty of marks all in the wrong places. What if one of those marks was in the future? On one unsuspecting spirit’s affections?---- FIMT CINEMATIC TRAILER

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: To the god at my feet, I offer sanctuary
entry.summary:
Author: TimesOnlyReason

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,925Chapters: 13/18Kudos: 150

Summary: In a flash of motion the blade of Excalibur rests against the hollow of Merlin's neck. ‘You are not fighting back,’ Arthur breathes with the shock and disgust a man can only feel when expecting pain and not receiving it, ‘is it out of trust, or do you truly not care if you die?’ ‘If it is by your hand, I would make no attempt to stop it’ Merlin replies, breathing just as heavy, a small shake of his head and scrunch of his brow - as if the answer were obvious. If this was what the king wanted - if this was how a destiny ends - for once in his life Merlin would comply with the order freely. -------During a bandit attack Arthur discovers Merlin's magic.How will this change them? Or have they already changed too much for it to matter? Can you truly hide who you are, or are you doomed to be known? UPDATED SCHEDULE - 1 chapter on Tuesdays and Saturdays (2 chapters a week)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Lancelot & Merlin (Merlin)
  • Knights of the Round Table & Merlin (Merlin)

  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • Gwaine (Merlin)
  • Gaius (Merlin)

  • and sentences that are more commas than words

  • They win the final battle without Merlin's magic
  • It's never addressed but that's the plot we are going with
  • no beta we die in the arms of our soulmate on a beach
  • Fuck AI
